title: Turrella railway station

infobox.value: Turrella Street, [Turrella](/wiki/Turrella,_New_South_Wales "Turrella, New South Wales") [Sydney](/wiki/Sydney "Sydney"), New South Wales Australia
[Transport Asset Manager of NSW](/wiki/Transport_Asset_Manager_of_New_South_Wales "Transport Asset Manager of New South Wales")
8.63 km (5.36 mi) from [Central](/wiki/Central_railway_station,_Sydney "Central railway station, Sydney")
* Weekdays:   Staffed: 6am to 2pm   * Weekends and public holidays:  Unstaffed
[TLL](/wiki/List_of_New_South_Wales_railway_station_codes "List of New South Wales railway station codes")

[T8](/wiki/Airport_%26_South_Line "Airport & South Line") | services to [Central](/wiki/Central_railway_station,_Sydney "Central railway station, Sydney") & the [City Circle](/wiki/City_Circle "City Circle") via the [Airport](/wiki/International_Airport_railway_station,_Sydney "International Airport railway station, Sydney") | [[6]](#cite_note-Timetable-6)

[T8](/wiki/Airport_%26_South_Line "Airport & South Line") | services to [Revesby](/wiki/Revesby_railway_station "Revesby railway station") early morning & late night services to [Macarthur](/wiki/Macarthur_railway_station "Macarthur railway station") | one weekday evening service terminates & returns to the [City Circle](/wiki/City_Circle "City Circle")[[6]](#cite_note-Timetable-6)

is a [suburban](/wiki/Commuter_rail "Commuter rail") [railway station](/wiki/Train_station "Train station") located on the [East Hills line](/wiki/East_Hills_railway_line "East Hills railway line"), serving the [Sydney](/wiki/Sydney "Sydney") suburb of [Turrella](/wiki/Turrella "Turrella"). It is served by [Sydney Trains](/wiki/Sydney_Trains "Sydney Trains") [T8 Airport & South Line](/wiki/Airport_%26_South_Line "Airport & South Line") services.
This figure is the number of entries and exits of a year combined averaged to a day.
["Turrella Station Upgrade"](https://www.transport.nsw.gov.au/projects/current-projects/turrella-station-upgrade). *Transport for NSW*. 20 November 2020. Retrieved 27 September 2024.

**Turrella railway station** is a [suburban](/wiki/Commuter_rail "Commuter rail") [railway station](/wiki/Train_station "Train station") located on the [East Hills line](/wiki/East_Hills_railway_line "East Hills railway line"), serving the [Sydney](/wiki/Sydney "Sydney") suburb of [Turrella](/wiki/Turrella "Turrella"). It is served by [Sydney Trains](/wiki/Sydney_Trains "Sydney Trains") [T8 Airport & South Line](/wiki/Airport_%26_South_Line "Airport & South Line") services.

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Turrella_railway_station&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: History")]

Turrella station opened on 21 September 1931 when the [East Hills line](/wiki/East_Hills_railway_line "East Hills railway line") opened from [Tempe](/wiki/Tempe_railway_station "Tempe railway station") to [East Hills](/wiki/East_Hills_railway_station "East Hills railway station").[[3]](#cite_note-3)[[4]](#cite_note-4) In 2000, as part of the quadruplication of the line between [Wolli Creek](/wiki/Wolli_Creek_railway_station "Wolli Creek railway station") and [Kingsgrove](/wiki/Kingsgrove_railway_station "Kingsgrove railway station"), through lines were added on either side of the existing pair.

In early 2024, Turrella station received an accessibility upgrade, which included a new concourse, lift and stairs, as well as other minor upgrades making the station fully accessible.[[5]](#cite_note-5)

## Services

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Turrella_railway_station&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Services")]

### Platforms

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Turrella_railway_station&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Platforms")]

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Platform | Line | Stopping pattern | Notes |
| 1 | [T8](/wiki/Airport_%26_South_Line "Airport & South Line") | services to [Central](/wiki/Central_railway_station,_Sydney "Central railway station, Sydney") & the [City Circle](/wiki/City_Circle "City Circle") via the [Airport](/wiki/International_Airport_railway_station,_Sydney "International Airport railway station, Sydney") | [[6]](#cite_note-Timetable-6) |
| 2 | [T8](/wiki/Airport_%26_South_Line "Airport & South Line") | services to [Revesby](/wiki/Revesby_railway_station "Revesby railway station") early morning & late night services to [Macarthur](/wiki/Macarthur_railway_station "Macarthur railway station") | one weekday evening service terminates & returns to the [City Circle](/wiki/City_Circle "City Circle")[[6]](#cite_note-Timetable-6) |

### Transport links

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Turrella_railway_station&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Transport links")]

[Transit Systems](/wiki/Transit_Systems_NSW "Transit Systems NSW") operates one bus route via Turrella station, under [contract](/wiki/Sydney_Metropolitan_Bus_Service_Contracts "Sydney Metropolitan Bus Service Contracts") to [Transport for NSW](/wiki/Transport_for_NSW "Transport for NSW"):

Turrella St:

* 473: [Campsie](/wiki/Campsie,_New_South_Wales "Campsie, New South Wales") to [Rockdale station](/wiki/Rockdale_railway_station "Rockdale railway station") via Clemton Park, Earlwood, Bardwell Park and Arncliffe[[7]](#cite_note-7)
